description: Evals for S7 dv-assertions: per-VIP SVA modules, DUT bind, assertion control, UVM checker, auto-gen protocol stubs

test_cases.name: APB-UART: full assertion generation from testplan + S5 TB data
test_cases.description: 3 testplan rows with checker_type=Assertion/Both. Tests: VIP assignment heuristic (APB protocol signals matched to apb_vip), assert+cover pair generation, CHK_ID in action blocks, DUT bind, UVM checker registration.

assertions.description: Per-VIP assertion directories created: apb_vip_agent/assertions/ and uart_vip_agent/assertions/
APB assertion correctly assigned to apb_vip (pclk/presetn/psel/penable match APB signal list)
UART assertion correctly assigned to uart_vip (txd/clk match UART signal list)
Every assert has matching cover property with COV_ label and $info action
assertions.check: apb_vip_if_assertions.sv contains COV_CHK_UART_APB_PROTOCOL_001 AND cover property AND $info("[COV]"

assertions.description: Pass action block added: $info('[PASS] CHK_ID...') on assert pass side
Empty assertion_code row (CHK_UART_TX_DATA_INTEGRITY_001) gets auto protocol stub with NEEDS_REVIEW
Assertion control: $assertoff at time-0, $asserton after rst_n posedge in each module
DUT bind module generated with bind blocks for both VIPs and dut_internal_assertions module
assertions.check: apb_uart_dut_bind.sv contains bind apb_uart_tb_top apb_vip_if_assertions AND bind apb_uart_tb_top uart_vip_if_assertions AND apb_uart_dut_internal_assertions

assertions.description: UVM assertion checker generated with all 3 CHK_IDs registered in _register_all_checkers
assertions.check: apb_uart_assertion_checker.sv contains CHK_UART_APB_PROTOCOL_001 AND CHK_UART_TX_FUNCTIONAL_001 AND CHK_UART_TX_DATA_INTEGRITY_001

assertions.description: compile.f updated: VIP assertion .sv files before tb_top, bind file last
assertions.check: compile.f contains apb_vip_if_assertions.sv AND uart_vip_if_assertions.sv AND apb_uart_dut_bind.sv (bind file appears after other assertion entries)

test_cases.name: AXI4 VIP with no testplan assertions — auto-generate protocol stubs
test_cases.description: VIP has no Assertion rows in testplan. Skill must auto-generate AXI4 protocol-standard properties (awvalid_stable, wvalid_stable, arvalid_stable) with NEEDS_REVIEW tags.

assertions.description: Auto-generated AXI4 properties: awvalid_stable, wvalid_stable, arvalid_stable
assertions.check: axi4_vip_if_assertions.sv contains p_axi_awvalid_stable AND p_axi_wvalid_stable AND p_axi_arvalid_stable
